mapper.select: select IFNULL(sum(vrhl.Number), 0) FROM v_req_hrleave_all_end AS vrhl WHERE vrhl.LeaveType='年假' AND vrhl.UserName=#{workCard} AND YEAR(vrhl.EndTime) = YEAR(CURDATE()) -- 查询今年的数据 AND vrhl.StartTime >= CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-01-01') -- 起始日期在当前年份的1月1日之后 AND vrhl.EndTime <= CONCAT(YEAR(CURDATE()), '-12-31'); -- 结束日期在当前年份的12月31日之前
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(number, 0)), 0) AS ts FROM v_req_hrleave_not_cancel WHERE leavetype = '事假' AND username = #{workCard} AND DATE_FORMAT(starttime, '%Y') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y')

SELECT IFNULL(a.xxrjb, 0) njts FROM (SELECT SUM(d.reviewhours) as xxrjb FROM (SELECT b.jbnickname,b.jbusername,b.endtime,b.reviewhours,c.xxrbs from v_req_hrovertime_all_end b LEFT JOIN (SELECT c.rq,c.xxrbs FROM mobile_platform_normal.sys_kq_date c WHERE DATE_FORMAT(c.rq,'%Y%m')=DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y%m') ) c on DATE_FORMAT(b.ReviewStartTime,'%Y-%m-%d') =c.rq WHERE b.jbUserName=#{workCard} AND DATE_FORMAT(b.ReviewStartTime,'%Y%m')=DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y%m') AND b.reviewhours<>'' and c.xxrbs=1) d group by d.jbusername ) a RIGHT JOIN (SELECT 0) t2 ON 1=1

select ifnull(sum(a.ydtxgs),0) ydtxgs from (SELECT DISTINCT RequisitionCode,ifnull( TotalNumber, 0 ) ydtxgs FROM v_req_hrleave_not_cancel WHERE UserName = #{workCard} AND LeaveType = '调休' AND DATE_FORMAT( StartTime, '%Y%m' ) = DATE_FORMAT( CURDATE( ), '%Y%m' ) GROUP BY RequisitionCode) a
select id, Keyword , ValueField , TextField , FatherId , SequenceNumber from req_parameter t where deleteflag=0 and Keyword=#{keyword} order by SequenceNumber
SELECT SUBSTRING(requisitioncode, 7, 3) FROM Req_Property where deleteflag=0 and date_format(createtime,'%y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(),'%y-%m-%d') order by requisitioncode desc limit 1
SELECT * FROM req_attachment WHERE RequisitionCode= #{oaOrder} and CreateBy = #{workCard}
select ID_ AS TaskId, PROC_INST_ID_ AS ProcessInstanceId FROM v_req_list_pending WHERE RequisitionCode = #{oaOrder}
